---
title: 'Wolfe Bible Institute'
date: '2022-10-05T15:16:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'NoHiding.Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6411115643147581902'
blogger_filename: '/p/bible.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/NoHiding.Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p>*Under Construction*</p><p><br /></p><p>Wolfe Bible Institute&nbsp;</p><p>I'm calling the sections belows "layers" as opposed to levels because you can enjoy a layered cake at any layer; but, you can only build a layered cake one layer at a time.&nbsp;</p><p>Layer 1</p><p>This is a book... How to read any book.</p><p>The Bible is a book, books have authors.</p><p>The Bible's claims to "inspiration", a look at the X-Files or Golden tablets view of inspiration, a look at what biblical inspiration actually is, why you need to know the difference.&nbsp;</p><p>The Bible is literature... A look at genre, style, literary technique.</p><p>The Bible is literature composed in the Ancient Near East (ANE) and in the Second Temple Judaism in a Greco-Roman conexts.&nbsp;</p><p><br /></p><p>Layer 2</p><p>The biblical meta-narrative</p><p><br /></p><p>Layer 3</p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p>Layer 4</p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p>Layer 5</p>
